description: Connect to Figma to sync design files, projects, components, styles, and comments via the Figma REST API using a Personal Access Token.

install_fields.label: Personal Access Token
install_fields.help: Generate from Figma → Account Settings → Security → Personal access tokens

install_fields.label: Team ID (optional)
install_fields.help: Found in your Figma team URL: figma.com/files/team/{team_id}/...

rate_limits.notes: Figma enforces ~100 req/min per token. The connector will receive 429 on breach and retries with exponential backoff.

auth_notes: Uses Personal Access Token (PAT) via the X-Figma-Token header. The PAT grants access to all files and teams the Figma account can see.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync Figma resources: projects → files → comments, plus components and styles.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: Return the list of projects for the given team_id.

apis.name: List Files
apis.description: Return the list of files for the given project_id.

apis.name: Get File
apis.description: Retrieve the full document tree for a Figma file.

apis.name: Get File Comments
apis.description: Return all comments for the given file_key.

apis.name: Get File Versions
apis.description: Return version history for the given file_key.

apis.name: List Components
apis.description: Return all published components for the given team (cursor-paginated).

apis.name: List Team Components
apis.description: Alias for list_components — kept for backward compatibility.

apis.name: List Styles
apis.description: Return all published styles for the given team (cursor-paginated).

name: FigmaConnector
